rag_rules: AGREE guarantee statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Output range guarantees for component types should use visible feature names and concrete bounds
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be declared within annex agree blocks in valid component type or implementation scopes
Guarantee expressions must reference only visible identifiers and properly typed helpers
Component type contracts should avoid implementation-specific subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes use the syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
Guarantee expressions must be boolean-valued and reference visible features or declared helpers
anti_patterns: Placing guarantee statements in component implementation scopes instead of component type scopes
Using subcomponent ports or implementation-specific paths in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
